sections.heading: Meet the Winners of 2026 Kicad Design Contest
sections.text: Blog > Meet the Winners of 2026 Kicad Design Contest Meet the Winners of 2026 Kicad Design Contest by: PCBWay Jul 06,2026 1274 Views 12 Comments Posted in News Over the course of the contest, we have been truly impressed by the creativity, technical excellence, and passion demonstrated by engineers and makers from around the world. Each submission reflected the power of KiCad and modern design workflows, as well as the shared spirit of innovation that drives the hardware community forward. As the 2026 KiCad Design Contest comes to a close, we sincerely thank all participants for their contributions. Your work has made this contest a vibrant showcase of open-source design, collaboration, and...
